name: vibebook
description: Sync AI coding sessions across machines and digest them into a per-project chronicle + topic book that AI agents can recall before tackling new work.

plugins.name: vibebook
plugins.description: Run /vibebook in Claude Code to digest your synced sessions into chronicle + topic. Run /vibebook-recall before starting work to surface past notes that bear on the current task. Atomic cards delegated to memex when installed.
